Paper

Cai, Kaiwen, Bing Wang, and Chris Xiaoxuan Lu. AutoPlace: Robust Place Recognition with Single-Chip Automotive Radar, 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation. IEEE, 2022.
